comments.comment: Used in University dental clinics

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The mercury amalgam is collected as used in dental clinics and disposed of through our hazardous waste program as needed once quantity warrants it. The hazardous waste program packages the waste for disposal by Miller Environmental (hazardous waste vendor).

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Mercury is handled by Miller Environmental and then a company named Veolia Canada where it is chemically retorted.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: We are disposing of it through Miller Environmental and then Veolia Canada and not recycling it. They perform a chemical retort.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Waste is not large enough to dispose of annually. 2024 was a disposal year.

reasonsForNoActivities.en: Activities were implemented in a previous year; additional activities are either unnecessary or unfeasible at this time
reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Des activités ont été mises en oeuvre lors d'une année précédente; des activités supplémentaires sont soit inutiles ou irréalisables actuellement

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes in emissions can be partly attributed to a return to normal levels of activity after prolonged COVID-19 reductions. They are also partly attributed to air handling adjustments that were made to allow for enhanced indoor air quality but that increased energy consumption.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Changes in emissions can be partly attributed to a return to normal levels of activity after prolonged COVID-19 restrictions, causing slight reductions in emissions. They are also partly attributed to air handling adjustments that were made to allow for enhanced indoor air quality but that increased energy consumption.
